privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world NORAD satellite catalog data within GPredict. The NORAD IDs precisely correspond to their real-world names: 38771 (METOP-B), 43689 (METOP-C), 37849 (SUOMI NPP), and 33591 (NOAA 19). The target Tristan da Cunha ground station location (-37.1052, -12.2777) accurately represents its geographic coordinates in the South Atlantic Ocean, and the task correctly enforces the creation of the station, the SAA_Targets module binding, and the required prediction preference changes (50 passes, map grid, map terminator).
